（没看过原片不影响阅读）
竺月死后幸运地被系统绑定，只要收集足够的能量，就可以用健康的身体一个世界一个世界地走下去，相当于永生。
为了能量，他可以付出一切。
然而不用他付出一切，能量源全都自己贴上来了。

世界二：死神来了
世界三：搭车人1986

世界五：寂静岭
世界六：康斯坦丁

真的很喜欢这种万人迷类型的，感觉作者的文笔也很好，没有其他那种门口小说那种莫名其妙的虐主角，或者说是完全是照着以前的剧情来的那种感觉，是真的感觉有在认真的写剧情也都很喜欢，哎呀，反正不知道该怎么说，就是很喜欢吧！请作者大大加油(ง ˙o˙)ว"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768016763,"group_id":"7573698256245361689","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"896793344490904"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7573698256245361689","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8665,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7576504646641959705","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"惊喜！！！发现一本美恐的新书。刚看完生化的感觉写的很不错[笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764046195,"group_id":"7573698256245361689","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"精致的皮囊千篇一律，有趣的灵魂百里挑一！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwMnfmJKDCnHS+oaV6eJDsQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/abaffb8701364d12b04e77e95f7ca9a9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617514&x-signature=AInfyK6yoEjZrrMtdkAemSZ6xRg%3D","user_id":"896793344490904","user_name":"超级宇宙无敌白毛激推"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"896793344490904","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7573698256245361689","book_info":{"abstract":"评分刚出，会涨的～【bl万人迷受，一见钟情，包含人外，部分世界有私设】（作者主角控）
